nasb.text: For there is no good tree which produces bad fruit, nor, on the other hand, a bad tree which produces good fruit.

esv.text: “For     no good tree bears bad fruit, nor again does a bad tree bear good fruit,

cnv.text: “因為好樹不能結壞果子，壞樹不能結好果子。

ccb.text: “好树不结坏果子，坏树也结不出好果子。

csbs.text: “好树不结坏果子，坏    树也不结好果子。
